title: Russian Chicken Skewers
description: A flavorful and colorful dish perfect for a summer evening, with marinated chicken and vegetable skewers.
instructions: Cut chicken into 1-inch pieces and thread onto skewers, leaving space between each piece.
Cut bell peppers, onions, zucchini, and tomatoes into 1-inch pieces and thread onto skewers with chicken.
In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, russian seasoning blend, and garlic.
Brush the mixture onto the chicken and vegetables.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until chicken is cooked through and vegetables are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with crisp russian dill.
